summary: Decompiled and typed a large slice of the Kinoko Route ground/stage implementation. The PR replaced several grkinokoroute.c placeholder functions with C implementations, added the stage data object and local static data, introduced Kinoko Route-specific Ground union structs in gr/types.h, and updated the grKinokoRoute_8020836C prototype. The decomp.dev report shows 4 new matches, including grKinokoRoute_8020836C and .sdata, plus major partial-match improvements for camera/route functions such as grKinokoRoute_80207C88, grKinokoRoute_80207634, grKinokoRoute_802078F0, and grKinokoRoute_80207B5C.

key_files.role: Main decompilation target; added Kinoko Route stage data, local static data, and C implementations for multiple route/camera/material functions.
Added grKinokoRoute_GroundVars, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2, and their Ground union entries.
Replaced an unknown prototype for grKinokoRoute_8020836C with void grKinokoRoute_8020836C(HSD_GObj*, s32).

what_changed: Added missing includes needed by the new decompiled logic, including gm/gm_1601.h, gr/stage.h, it/it_26B1.h, lb/lb_00F9.h, lb/lbvector.h, mp/mplib.h, and baselib/debug.h.
Added a local grNKr_Depths struct wrapping an s16[51] table and moved the depth list used by grKinokoRoute_80208564 into static const data grNKr_803B82F4.
Added static const Vec3 grNKr_803B82E8 as a zero vector used for fighter position initialization in grKinokoRoute_80207C88.
Added grNKr_803E5840 as the stage file string "/GrNKr.dat" and grNKr_803E584C as the StageData definition for KINOKOROUTE.

Implemented grKinokoRoute_80207634 to cache four route-related JObjs, compute their positions relative to an origin JObj, and widen camera bounds using Stage_GetCamBounds*Offset values after applying the current camera offset.
Implemented grKinokoRoute_802078F0 to follow the current fighter: it obtains fighter position through ftLib_80086644, scales by Ground_801C0498, and updates cached JObj translate X/Y values.

Implemented grKinokoRoute_80207B5C to initialize a Kinoko Route ground object, set callbacks and flags, initialize phase/zone/camera/spawn state, call grKinokoRoute_80208564, and store the initial translation of JObj 4 in reb0_pos.

Implemented most of grKinokoRoute_80207C88, handling fighter/camera tracking, clamped route movement, phase changes, spawn index detection, zone index updates, stage_info.x6DC, JObj repositioning, ground object refreshes, zako generator transitions, camera smoothing via cam_timer, and a one-shot mpLib_80058560 update flag.
Implemented grKinokoRoute_8020836C to hide/show a JObj subtree, add/remove map joints, and update material state for item kind 0xA0 while iterating HSD_GObj_Entities->items.
Changed grKinokoRoute_80208564 to use GET_GROUND(gobj) instead of directly reading gobj->user_data, and to copy from the static grNKr_803B82F4 depth table before indexing depths.x[i].

Added typed Kinoko Route ground variable structs: an entries[4] structure containing Vec3 pos plus HSD_JObj* jobj, and a second state struct containing flags, phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, and reb0_pos.
smart_moves: Typed the ground state before using it heavily, which made the new C read like real stage logic instead of offset arithmetic and enabled safer access through gp->gv.kinokoroute and gp->gv.kinokoroute2.
Used a small wrapper struct for the 51-entry depth table, likely to force static data layout/copy behavior matching the original rather than leaving the array as a stack initializer.
Preserved stage-specific state names that reflect observed behavior, such as phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, and reb0_pos, without overclaiming higher-level game design names.
Kept JObj null checks and HSD_ASSERT calls where the original logic required them, including assertions for the route/reb0 JObjs in grKinokoRoute_80207B5C and grKinokoRoute_80207C88.
Used GET_GROUND consistently in touched code, aligning the file with project access macros and avoiding raw user_data casts.
Modeled camera movement with explicit Vec3 arithmetic and timer-based interpolation, making a complex route camera routine partially match while remaining understandable.
Updated the public header prototype once grKinokoRoute_8020836C's argument and return types were known, reducing future reliance on UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, matching may require reconstructing not only functions but also StageData, stage file path strings, .sdata2 zero vectors, and rodata tables used by helper loops.

When a local array initializer resists matching, test whether the original used a static const object copied into a local struct; grKinokoRoute_80208564 improved after using grNKr_803B82F4 through grNKr_Depths.
Stage ground variables should be added to the Ground union as typed structs once repeated offsets are understood; this supports both matching and reviewability.
Route/camera functions often combine fighter-position queries, stage camera offset accessors, bounds clamping, map joint toggles, and ground object refresh calls; preserving call order is critical.

Use existing project helpers such as lbVector_Sub, lbVector_Diff, lbVector_Normalize, lbVector_Add, Stage_UnkSetVec3TCam_Offset, and Ground_801C38BC rather than open-coding vector math if the original appears to call library routines.

For item/material side effects, iterate HSD_GObj_Entities->items and use item kind checks when the original targets a specific item class; here kind 0xA0 triggers grMaterial_801C8E08/grMaterial_801C8E28.

Camera timer smoothing can be matched by computing a reciprocal step from the remaining timer, applying vector delta toward the target, writing the camera position, and decrementing the timer after the write.
naming_conventions: Stage-local symbols use the grNKr_ prefix for Kinoko Route data, such as grNKr_803B82E8, grNKr_803B82F4, grNKr_803E5840, and grNKr_803E584C.
Function names remain address-based grKinokoRoute_8020xxxx names because no semantic names were introduced in this PR.
Ground variable structs are named by stage and purpose: grKinokoRoute_GroundVars, grKinokoRoute_GroundVars_Entry, and grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2.
Ground union members use lower-case stage identifiers: kinokoroute and kinokoroute2.
Field names are conservative behavior labels rather than speculative names: pos, jobj, flags, phase, spawn_idx, zone_idx, cam_timer, reb0_pos.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced placeholder comments for grKinokoRoute_80207634, grKinokoRoute_802078F0, grKinokoRoute_80207B5C, grKinokoRoute_80207C88, and grKinokoRoute_8020836C with C implementations.
Introduced a static const zero Vec3 for initialization instead of manually assigning zero components in grKinokoRoute_80207C88.
Used a struct-wrapped static const s16 depth table copied into a local variable in grKinokoRoute_80208564, improving data and code matching.
Inserted PAD_STACK(16) in grKinokoRoute_8020836C, indicating stack layout padding was needed for a match.
Used explicit HSD_ASSERT line numbers, such as 467, 617, and 654, to preserve debug/assert layout.
Preserved boolean and integer constants directly where evidence exists, including phase comparisons, spawn_idx == -1, cam_timer = 0x3C, item kind 0xA0, and route JObj/map joint IDs.

Bot evidence: decomp.dev reported grKinokoRoute_8020836C at 100.00%, .sdata at 100.00%, grKinokoRoute_8020754C and grKinokoRoute_80208564 at 100.00%, and large unmatched improvements for grKinokoRoute_80207C88, grKinokoRoute_80207634, grKinokoRoute_802078F0, and grKinokoRoute_80207B5C.

review_feedback.feedback: Matched code increased by 760 bytes (+0.02%) and matched data by 16 bytes.
review_feedback.details: 4 new matches: grKinokoRoute_8020836C, .sdata, grKinokoRoute_8020754C, and grKinokoRoute_80208564.

grKinokoRoute_80207C88 reached 85.48%, grKinokoRoute_80207634 reached 92.71%, grKinokoRoute_802078F0 reached 95.98%, grKinokoRoute_80207B5C reached 91.15%, .data reached 88.68%, .sdata2 reached 71.79%, and .rodata reached 97.44%.

review_feedback.feedback: No human review comments or PR body were present in the provided slice.
review_feedback.details: The only issue comment in the slice was the decomp.dev report.

follow_up_queries: Check later PRs touching grkinokoroute.c for completion of grKinokoRoute_80207C88 from 85.48% to full match.
Search for other stage files that use struct-wrapped static depth tables to match local array copy behavior.
Compare grKinokoRoute_GroundVars2 layout against remaining unknown Ground union members for similar camera/phase state patterns.
Look for later renames of phase, zone_idx, spawn_idx, cam_timer, and reb0_pos if more semantic route behavior becomes known.
Audit whether grNKr_803E584C StageData becomes declared in a header or referenced by stage-loader tables in subsequent PRs.
